chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated Specialty trust administration providers serving RIAs and family offices companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.

last_event.message: Pipeline starting. Niche: Specialty trust administration providers serving RIAs and family offices, geography: NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US), target: 5 memos.
